speaking.title: Speaking Part 1: Daily questions
questions: What time do you start work or school?
Where do you study or work?
Why do you like it there?
speaking.sampleAnswer: I start school at eight o'clock. I study at a school downtown. I like it because I have many good friends there.

speaking.title: Speaking Part 1: Likes and dislikes
questions: Do you ever disagree with your friends?
Is there something you never do?
Is there something you rarely do?
speaking.sampleAnswer: Yes, I sometimes disagree with my friends. I never eat fast food. I rarely watch TV at night.
